About.Name: Sedra Baian
About.AboutText:
Hi, I’m Sedra Baian, a Computer Science student at Seattle Pacific University with a strong interest in data analysis, software development, and building practical solutions.

I enjoy working on projects where I can turn data into meaningful insights and create systems that solve real-world problems. Recently, I have been focusing on Python, data visualization, and building end-to-end projects that demonstrate both technical and analytical skills.

In addition to my technical background, I bring strong communication and problem-solving abilities from my experience in client-facing roles. I am always looking for opportunities to grow, learn new technologies, and gain hands-on experience through internships and projects.

Experience.ExperienceText: I am currently a Computer Science student building a strong foundation in programming, data analysis, and software development. Alongside my studies, I have gained real-world experience through roles that strengthened my communication, analytical thinking, and ability to work in fast-paced environments.
Experience.EducationText: My coursework focuses on programming, data analysis, and statistics. I am actively working on projects that apply these skills, including data cleaning, visualization, and building structured applications.
Experience.EmploymentText: Educated clients on insurance options and helped them choose suitable coverage. Developed strong communication, problem-solving, and relationship-building skills in a fast-paced environment.
Experience.SkillsText: I have experience working with Python for data analysis and visualization, along with foundational knowledge in Java. I am continuously improving my technical skills through projects and coursework, while also leveraging strong communication and analytical thinking.

Project1.Title: Amazon Reviews Data Analysis
Project1.Desc:
Analyzed a large dataset of Amazon product reviews using Python.

Performed data cleaning, handled missing values, and created visualizations to uncover trends in customer satisfaction and product performance.

Project2.Title: Business Analytics Dashboard
Project2.Desc:
Designed an interactive dashboard using Tableau/Power BI to track key performance indicators such as sales trends, customer behavior, and category performance.

Focused on delivering clear business insights through visual storytelling.
